title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Persistent Systems

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Persistent Systems
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Persistent Systems in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Persistent Systems:
Persistent Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems!
